summary: Resolved the active mutation evidence coherence warning by fixing a scanner false positive where global dirty-file truncation hid dirty .ai/mutation-evidence artifacts from the posture check. Historical task-lifecycle and inbox reconcile apply paths were left as explicit residuals because dry-runs found malformed, missing, stale, and conflict records.
root_cause: checkMutationEvidencePosture relied on the globally expanded and truncated gitPorcelainChangedFiles result to detect dirty mutation evidence artifacts. In a large dirty worktree, authority-surface files were within the first 200 expanded paths while .ai/mutation-evidence artifacts were beyond the truncation window, so the scanner reported missing evidence even though companion mutation-evidence files were dirty.
residuals: task_lifecycle reconcile apply was not run because dry-run found malformed and missing historical evidence records.
inbox reconcile apply was not run because dry-run found stale, conflict, and malformed records.
Existing unrelated dirty authority-surface work was not reverted.

verification.result: dry-run only; reported current records plus malformed and missing historical records
dry-run only; reported current records plus stale, conflict, and malformed records
